title: M8.0-StarDrive engine
content:
{{Top|canon=M8.0 StarDrive engine}}
The '''M8.0-StarDrive engine''' was a type of [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] sublight drive built by the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]]. Four of these were used aboard the [[MC80A Home One Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|''Home One'' type]] and [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|''Liberty'' type]] variants of the [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruiser]], along with six smaller [[M4.5-StarDrive maneuvering engine/Legends|M4.5-StarDrive maneuvering engines]].

{{Tech-stub}}
